---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Gridlock and Legislative Action Amidst NEET Protests"
date: 2026-07-22T10:36:07.844815+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces repeated adjournments and opposition protests over NEET irregularities, while the government advances key judicial and social legislation"
run_time_ist: "4:06PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:06PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary disruption:</strong> The Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha faced repeated adjournments as the Opposition protested against NEET irregularities and alleged government suppression of debate, with TMC MP Kalyan Banerjee suspended for unparliamentary conduct.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial and legislative updates:</strong> Parliament is moving to introduce the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026, while the Rajya Sabha successfully passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxNRGZaRlJ2UXJkWDZuQld3RGpiaVlNcjVTbDRibVhBS01uVXNwV3JmSzBFcERxQWsxbHJSR1dLUXNQOFVRNlBFTGJ3TWhEZ2JCTl9ON1gwTE5DWkIxSUhZOVFDZWFFUS1peFFSc2N0STRsb0FyV2txSHJrWXpMcGxHV3REdmVhLTdhSkZRN1N1Q0F1MVNqNGhFUDhVbFVwX3pJTjhVT09hZUcyMVhaZTlPRjdNSWlTc2gxRGRsekZWSS1VNXRLaFNGUlBRZw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I26</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legal challenges:</strong> The Supreme Court has issued a notice to the Lok Sabha Speaker regarding a plea challenging the merger of Shiv Sena (UBT) MPs with the Eknath Shinde-led faction.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxPc0dYOHdoNnNCdjFaZDVvYlA0OUpETWpxaGNrRUJ2RElXSHdLOXE3TzZQYl95UUR1SW12MFhqSXkwQ25nMXJLMzF5My1Xam02OHBHWi1sYUdoaDVFY1ZZWF8zMEJjOFFLR1otaUNiSHJ6bjhQLUhmR0lTb0Q4MC1RVUVKYlhoVm01emlKQlpzeV8tcU9hWHlQUEZuemkzV2pH?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>NEET controversy:</strong> Opposition leaders, including Rahul Gandhi and Akhilesh Yadav, led black-clad protests demanding the resignation of the Union Education Minister over alleged paper leaks and irregularities in the NEET examination.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivwFBVV95cUxPMTJ4cnJYRjdhRUg2ZHJWeVNIV0NCYXlLUUtBUy13WlFGV2wwMVlfbzk5eVR1eXRaWGJtWFhFd080czlDemFYYS1OUXhFd1lfRGZzcjJ5SzRUMHRHSUxLQ1E2RHZ6bVpEQUFDaV9sRDlTb08yWWtjMDlQbjBfY1E5STlZTl81QVZwZW1pUk9HekpGc08yaHZqeWc1MGFna19MRzQ2MWZSWkNJZkxGMWx3T3ZvcWt3akExVnFxR1pERQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election oversight:</strong> A Bihar BJP delegation has formally complained to the Election Commission of India regarding campaign expenditure concerns related to Prashant Kishor in the Bankipur byelection.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W9] Opposition MPs stage protest against govt at Parliament in black clothes, Congress says lakhs of students will stand up - ANI News</a> ANI News</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W10] Rahul Gandhi, Akhilesh Yadav lead black-clad Opposition protest in Parliament over NEET protest - Telegraph India</a> Telegraph India</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxQbjlCWU1MZ3NhdkVmbDQ0WjRLWDdMZzVBOXJTMGlRNERkQ0xoNW05eG5XVVVRamxLWmV2cnU2YnFSSEdHN0VRV01qN3BRTmRZMXllbGI0cERnUV9LWm03aU1nT2Q4WTdLUGxxNzBSUmlGN3h0N09QVDR5UGUtUmJPc0o5cktzV2lkeG1mMUR3QWc4WVVXRU1RSEQ0UmRTQUF5NVYxRTVaYjd2S3NxNmVab0s0TQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W13] Chilean government’s sweeping reform bill advances in Congress By Reuters - Investing.com</a> Investing.com</li>
